SEARCH
Package org.sim.fish

Class Fish

java.lang.Object
org.sim.Entity
org.sim.fish.Fish
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProfilable
public class Fish extends Entity implements IProfilable
Represents the main living actor of the simulation. It moves around, looks for targets via FOV, processes its AI state machine, and reproduces.

    float
    Bite(float plantToMeatDigestion, float damage)
    Lowers the health of this fish when it gets bitten, and returns digested energy to the attacker.
    void
    CalculateFOV(ArrayList<Entity> entities)
    Scans the world list to find which objects are close enough to be seen by this fish.
    void

    Handles the fish death sequence by removing it and spawning a piece of meat in its place.

    Provides a list of text strings containing current fish status for the IProfile interface.

    Updates the internal life logic of the fish on every simulation tick.

  • Constructor Details

    • Fish

      public Fish(processing.core.PVector position, Genes genes, Sex sex)

    • Fish

      public Fish()

  • Method Details

    • Update

      public void Update()
      Updates the internal life logic of the fish on every simulation tick. It updates the state, subtracts continuous genetic energy upkeep, checks for starvation, regenerates health points (HP) if the fish has enough energy, and triggers the death sequence if energy drops below zero.
      Overrides:
      Update in class Entity

    • CalculateFOV

      public void CalculateFOV(ArrayList<Entity> entities)
      Scans the world list to find which objects are close enough to be seen by this fish.

    • Bite

      public float Bite(float plantToMeatDigestion, float damage)
      Lowers the health of this fish when it gets bitten, and returns digested energy to the attacker.
      Overrides:
      Bite in class Entity
      Parameters:
      plantToMeatDigestion - The digestion efficiency coefficient of the attacker.
      damage - The amount of damage dealt by the attacker.
      Returns:
      The amount of energy transferred to the attacker.

    • Die

      public void Die()
      Handles the fish death sequence by removing it and spawning a piece of meat in its place.
      Overrides:
      Die in class Entity

    • GetProfile

      public List<String> GetProfile()
      Provides a list of text strings containing current fish status for the IProfile interface.
      Specified by:
      GetProfile in interface IProfilable
